title: Professional Carbon Steel Black Knife Sharpening Steel, Black 12 Inch
features: 12" Sharpening Steel maintains the edge on knives and extends the life of your cutlery with regular use.
Steel rod is made of carbon steel and plated with nickel-chrome.
Ergonomic, easy-to-grip polypropylene handle with hanging hole.
Wipe clean with a damp cloth.
Normally used for Dull Knifes, Best Choice for chef using.
description: Product Description ALLWIN-HOUSEWARE products express the pursuit of high-quality life with simple and practical concept, it interprets urban high-quality life and advocates a kind of life style combining fashion and life. Starting from the establishment of ALLWIN-HOUSEWARE in 2017, no matter how the world changes, we win the favour of consumers with our motto which is understanding our clients. ALLWIN-HOUSEWARE moving forward from combining the westerners living habits, collecting suggestion and improving products, express the meaning of simple and practical from houseware to kitchenware. Carbon Steel and Magnetized for Safety! The steel rod is made of carbon steel and plated with nickel-chrome; the fine surface of the steel rod prevents the cutting edge from damage when sharpening. Our honing rods are magnetized to prevent metal particles from being inhaled or landing on nearby food. Easy and Safe to Use Now much less effort is needed to sharpen your knives with this rod because its ergonomic handle fits all hands, whether you are right or left handed, making it easy to use. Care Instruction Please use non-woven oil cloth soaked with cooking oil to wipe the body of the sharpening rod and dry it. When washed with water, make sure to wipe dry completely after washing and hang in a cool place to dry completely. Avoid putting the sharpening rod in dishwasher or water.
